events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: the exceeded sidewall pressure/jamming during the feeder/branch pull is treated as an installed-defective, non-compliant condition (not merely a planning risk that was avoided), since the work is already rough-complete. Decision is `fail` with `high` risk at 70% complete, requiring insulation testing, inspection for conductor damage, corrected pull calculations, possible re-pull, and verification of conductor identification per NEC 200.6/210.5 before proceeding.
